rationale: The previous attempt failed because the per-field ensures conjuncts (e.g. `post1.page_array@[index as int].addr =~= pre.page_array@[index as int].addr`) are conjuncts of the LHS of the synthetic implication, not free hypotheses, so they were not in scope when discharging the inner `=~=` asserts (and the prior asserts used the bound variable `i` rather than the literal `index as int` the ensures use). The fix wraps the whole proof in `if (full_antecedent) { ... }` to pull every conjunct into scope, then does the per-field work at the literal `index as int` (using `=~=` for Set/Ghost fields and asserting `==` on primitive Page fields), lifts to whole-`Page` `=~=` at index, runs an `assert forall|i|` with a case-split on `i == index as int` (index-congruence vs the forall ensures), and finishes with Seq extensionality on `page_array@`.
